message:
feat(dashboard): switch terminal handler to vsock

Update ServeHTTP to use vsock connections instead of SSH:
- Parse cols/rows query params with 80x24 defaults
- Use GetVMCID instead of GetVMIP
- Use createVsockSession instead of createSSHSession
- Use handleVsockSession instead of handleSession
- Remove TerminalManager session tracking (vsock sessions manage their own lifecycle)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
